lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches, dents, or paint imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly.

Experience driving at its absolute finest with this stunning vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, meticulously maintained and looking as flawless as the day it was first driven. From its pristine exterior to its spotless interior, this car is a rare find for any enthusiast looking for perfection.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or blemishes. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair overall condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows some typical signs of age, including minor surface scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery is intact but displays noticeable wear on the driver’s side bolster and some light staining on the floor mats. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though it will likely require new tires and a brake service within the next few months. It has been maintained regularly, but it is certainly not a show car. This is a solid option for someone looking for functional transportation without the premium price of a pristine model.
This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The engine starts reliably and runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts cleanly through all gears

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a consistent service history. The exterior retains its professional luster, while the interior remains well-preserved, reflecting a high standard of previous ownership. For the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that delivers sustained performance, this selection stands as a premier candidate.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. The interior is nice and clean, and it drives like a dream. I’ve taken good care of it, and it’s definitely ready for some new adventures with you. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs reliably. Firm price for quick sale.

This 2015 BMW M3 is a stunning example of precision engineering, finished in classic Alpine White over a refined Black Merino leather interior. Having been meticulously maintained by an enthusiast, the car presents beautifully. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway mileage. Inside, the driver-centric cockpit features genuine carbon fiber trim and remains smoke-free; the heated leather seats are firm, with only light softening on the driver’s outer bolster. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health. It comes with a comprehensive service history, including a recent oil service, brake fluid flush, and a fresh set of spark plugs. The 19-inch M-Double Spoke wheels are wrapped in Michelin Pilot Super Sport tires with approximately 70% tread remaining. The twin-turbo inline-six pulls strongly across the rev range, and the

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Presented in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, it offers a refined driving experience that balances consistent performance with enduring value. A sophisticated choice for those who demand reliability and prestige in equal measure.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic poise. Presenting in commendable condition, the automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its performance standards meet our exacting criteria. With a well-preserved interior and a robust service history, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value. It remains a standout example of engineering durability and refined styling, ready for immediate delivery.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure? This car is in great shape and runs like a dream! It's perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I've taken really good care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it can hit the road again. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis integrity is maintained with essential subframe reinforcement and a refreshed multi-link rear suspension setup. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive dual-VANOS service and rod bearing inspection to ensure the valvetrain and bottom end remain robust. Equipped with a torque-sensing limited-slip M differential, this example provides exceptional mechanical grip and turn-in response. The vehicle presents in excellent mechanical health, offering a visceral driving experience for the discerning purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, maintained with a discerning eye for detail. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and clean, and all electronic features—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust and dependable. It has been serviced regularly according to manufacturer intervals, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Whether you are looking for a reliable daily commuter or a refined car for weekend trips, this vehicle is ready for the road and offers exceptional value for its well-maintained condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term reliability. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking an authoritative driving experience at a compelling value proposition.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and showing clear pride of ownership, this model offers a refined driving experience characterized by its structural integrity and mechanical consistency. It remains a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that has been preserved with professional care.

Hi there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! She’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape, perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. I’ve taken great care of her over the years, so you’re getting a smooth, dependable car that’s ready to hit the road today. I’m honestly sad to see her go, but I know she’ll make her next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. The powertrain is paired with a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS system refresh to ensure variable valve timing remains within tight tolerances. The chassis dynamics are sharp, benefiting from recent bushing replacements and a well-sorted suspension setup. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the mechanical integrity and performance envelope remain uncompromising. A technically sound example for the purist who values mechanical engagement and atmospheric induction.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained 2018 executive sedan offers a perfect blend of performance, comfort, and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Step inside to a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring premium leather seating that remains supple and well-preserved. All technological features, including the high-definition navigation system, premium surround-sound audio, and driver-assist safety suite, are fully functional and intuitive. Under the hood, the engine performs flawlessly, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and regular oil changes. The transmission provides seamless shifts, and the suspension remains firm yet comfortable, absorbing road imperfections with ease. With a fresh set of all-season tires and a clean bill of health from its recent multi-point inspection, this vehicle is ready for the long haul. Complete service records and both original key fobs are included.

This expertly maintained vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated styling. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by consistent performance and a well-preserved interior. A premier selection for those who demand reliability without compromising on professional presentation.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated styling. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and interior refinement. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and long-term durability, this selection represents an outstanding value proposition for the discerning motorist seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Offered is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear, high-revving power band. This example features a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including documented rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension maintains its factory-tuned damping characteristics, providing exceptional turn-in and communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. While showing honest patina consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals remain robust, delivering the precise throttle response and balanced weight distribution synonymous with the M-division pedigree.
Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title.

This 2017 Audi S5 Sportback offers a sophisticated blend of executive luxury and exhilarating performance. The exterior is finished in a stunning Daytona Gray Pearl that retains a brilliant shine, though it shows minor, expected road wear such as light stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a masterclass in ergonomics, featuring Magma Red fine Nappa leather sport seats that are well-preserved and free of significant wear or cracking. All technological features, including the Audi Virtual Cockpit, MMI Navigation plus, and the premium Bang & Olufsen 3D sound system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust; the 3.0L turbocharged V6 engine delivers smooth, consistent power through the Tiptronic transmission and legendary Quattro all-wheel-drive system. It has been maintained according to factory schedules, with recent service including a comprehensive fluid flush and new performance brake pads. This is a reliable, well-loved vehicle that presents beautifully and is ready for its next enthusiast owner.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, this unit offers consistent reliability and a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this vehicle has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and presentation. Invest in a vehicle that delivers proven performance without compromise.
